catalog_principles: Keep small hand-authored valid and invalid fixtures in repository history.
Move large campaign/readback progress output to content-addressed storage after a migration tool exists.
Preserve SHA-256 digest, source repo, source commit, schema, node id, generated timestamp, and public-safety scan status in the catalog index.
Require consumer readbacks to verify catalog digests before treating externalized evidence as current.
non_goals: No evidence is moved by this node.
No storage provider is selected by this node.
No release, upload, or publish is authorized by this node.
